trigon_hatch.title: Hatch the Baby Ender Trigon egg — follow the Ender Trigon mod hatch ritual conditions

trigon_bond.title: Complete the Baby Trigon taming process — feed it to bond and begin growth phase

subtitle.text: Three heads. One parent. The parent is dead. The offspring chose you anyway. Raise it correctly.

description: CH.14 · THE BABY TRIGON
▸ The Ender Trigon drops a baby dragon egg on defeat.
This egg hatches into the only tameable dragon companion
in the pack.
The Dracolotl (Ch04) was a companion.
The Baby Trigon is an heir.
It will grow. It will fight.
It will follow you into Ch15-17.
◈ HATCH RITUAL
└ Ender Trigon mod hatch conditions — check mod guide:
Likely: specific biome (End), night or specific conditions,
specific items nearby during hatch activation
└ Activation: right-click egg with appropriate item
(common pattern: Ender Pearl or End Stone nearby)
└ Hatch location: outer End island recommended
(hatchling is fragile at birth — do not hatch near void edge)
└ If hatch fails: verify you are in the End dimension
◈ TAMING AND GROWTH
└ Feed hatchling: End-appropriate food (Ender Pearl, Enderman Meat,
or mod-specific taming item — check Ender Trigon mod guide)
└ Bond mechanic: multiple feeding sessions build trust
└ Growth phases: baby → juvenile → full companion
Growth time: varies by mod, may require specific foods
└ Name tag: name your Trigon — it prevents despawn
and makes it trackable if it wanders
◈ COMPANION ABILITIES
└ Flight: grown Trigon can carry the player in flight
└ Combat: attacks enemies that attack the player
Three-headed dragon: three attack patterns
└ Void-adapted: no fall/void damage mechanics apply
└ End biome bonus: Trigon is at full strength in End dimension
▸ The baby Trigon has three heads.
Each head inherited a different attack from the parent.
The parent tried to kill you with all three.
The baby looks at you with all three and decides: companion.
That decision process is not documented.
Accept it.
▶ Hatch the Baby Ender Trigon egg [check]
▶ Complete the taming bonding process [check]
◇ The grown Baby Trigon is your aerial combat companion
for Ch15-17 outdoor boss encounters.
It is particularly effective against
non-void entities that appear post-End-game.
Keep it named. Keep it fed. Keep it with you.
